title: phyllanthus cumingii
intro: Phyllanthus cumingii, also known as the Philippine globe cherry or Mayana tree, is a plant species in the Phyllanthaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cumingii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Phyllanthus cumingii is often prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its leaves and stems in water, and it is also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as tonics and remedies, to harness its medicinal properties.
